expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly addresses the case focus, stating the blocking requirement and evaluating it: “supporting issues must stay `context_only_no_defect_analysis` and Phase 1 must produce supporting-issue summaries” and then checks for those artifacts (spawn manifest, supporting summaries, relation map), concluding they are “Not demonstrable (FAIL given blind_pre_defect evidence).”

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly Phase 1 aligned: title includes “Phase 1 Contract”; it enumerates “Phase 1 required behavior” and “What was checked (phase1-aligned)”, and evaluates alignment via Phase 1 artifacts (e.g., “Phase 1’s defining output is `phase1_spawn_manifest.json`”), concluding alignment is not demonstrable due to missing Phase 1 outputs.
